The Amityville Horror (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $65,233,369Details
International Box Office $43,942,304
Worldwide Box Office $109,175,673
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,507,007 (36.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,500,000 (worldwide box office is 5.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,323 opening theaters/3,323 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $115,099,744

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 15th, 2005 (Wide) by Filmways Pictures
International Releases: April 15th, 2005 (Wide), released as Amityville Horror (Australia)
Video Release: October 4th, 2005 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: R for violence, disturbing images, language, brief sexuality and drug use.
Running Time: 89 minutes
Franchise: Amityville
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Haunting
Social setting: Supernatural
Source material: Based on an UNTRUE Story
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Dimension Films, Michael Bay, Platinum Dunes, Radar Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
